title: The Hailuo AI Workshop is FULL 🚀 Massive thank you to everyone who signed up. Your support and enthusiasm mean the world 💜 Can’t wait to dive in with you all on April 18 and create some seriously cool things together with Hailuo! See you soon~ 😉

content.summary: The Hailuo AI Workshop is FULL 🚀 Massive thank you to everyone who signed up. Your support and enthusiasm mean the world 💜 Can’t wait to dive in with you all on April 18 and create some seriously cool things together with Hailuo! See you soon~ 😉 Hailuo AI (MiniMax) (@Hailuo_AI) 🇲🇾Hailuo AI (MiniMax) Workshop - Kuala Lumpur The first Hailuo AI Workshop lands in Malaysia! Dive into an immersive hands-on experience with cutting-edge AI tools — for creators, filmmakers, designers and anyone ready to shape the future of visual storytelling. Let's build something cool together! 🕑Saturday, April 18, 2:00PM-8:30PM (GMT+8) 📍Locarasa Restaurant & Patisserie, Kuala Lumpur 🔗Request to Join >> luma.com/2gt3tjhg — https://nitter.net/Hailuo_AI/status/2030924669012853157#m
